_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: SteelMC
author: AshuraV1
description: Steel is a lightweight Rust implementation of the Minecraft server.

installation.script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
echo "Downloading Steel"

cd /mnt/server

STEEL_VERSION="${STEEL_VERSION}"

if [ "$STEEL_VERSION" = "latest" ]; then
  URL="https://github.com/Steel-Foundation/SteelMC/releases/latest/download/steel-linux"
else
  URL="https://github.com/Steel-Foundation/SteelMC/releases/download/${STEEL_VERSION}/steel-linux"
fi

if ! curl -sS -L --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 120 --fail "$URL" -o steel; then
  echo "ERROR: Failed to download Steel binary from GitHub."
  exit 1
fi

chmod +x steel

echo "Installation successful"
exit 0

variables.name: Steel Version
variables.description: The version from the release page in github: https://github.com/Steel-Foundation/SteelMC/releases
